title: Surgeon Vacancy at CMC Vellore Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at CMC Vellore Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? CMC Vellore Capital India in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CMC Vellore Capital India:
CMC Vellore Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore Capital India!
